attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , 
  DRVD.BK_SS_CD , 
  DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , 
  DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  NRSCA.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ,
  CASE  WHEN ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  ) < (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100) 
   THEN NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
   ELSE   NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
  END AS BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT , 
  CASE  WHEN ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  ) < (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
   THEN NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
   ELSE   NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
  END AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
  CASE  WHEN ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  ) < (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
   THEN (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
   ELSE   ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  )
  END AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT 
 FROM 
  ( SELECT BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
   FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH 
   WHERE CURRENT_DATE-1 BETWEEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
  ) NFISMN_SYS ,
  
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV  DRVD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON DRVD.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRA
ON(NRA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=DRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX   NRSCA
   ON NRSCA.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NRA.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT   
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX SRSCA
ON (SRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY=NRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY )
INNER JOIN 
 ( SELECT BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE, SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG   QUOTA_FLAG
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV  
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE   ORDER BY END_TV_DATE DESC)=1
) NSCTT
  ON NRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD = NSCTT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN  
  ON  NRSCA.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM BETWEEN NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
 WHERE
  DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD IN ('X','R')
  AND DRVD.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD = 'FORWARD' 
  AND DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLG = 'Y' 
   /* TO PULL INCREMENTALLY */ 
 /*AND NRA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'ERP' Q1FY17 commented as part of xaas sc Q1FY18*/
 AND NRSCA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM   > '$$LastExtractDate'
QUALIFY RANK () OVER ( PARTITION BY BK_SS_CD , DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD  , DV_TRANSACTION_KEY, NRSCA.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ORDER BY NRSCA.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT DESC)=1

SELECT 
  DRVD.DV_REVENUE_FLG      ,          
  ROW_NUMBER()  OVER( ORDER BY WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ) AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ,  /*Actual transaction_seq_id will be calculated while populating to DRVD table */
  DRVD.BK_SS_CD                      ,
  DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * -1,
  DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   * -1,
  DRVD.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT      ,
  DRVD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              ,
  DRVD.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            ,
  DRVD.LINE_TYPE_CD                  ,
  DRVD.SPLIT_PCT    *-1               ,  
  DRVD.GL_DTM                        ,
  DRVD.GL_POSTED_DTM                 ,
  DRVD.RULE_START_DTM                ,
  'REVERSE' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CD  ,
  'N' AS LAST_RECORD_FLG ,
  DRVD.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD        ,
  DRVD.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
  WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
  WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT  AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
  DRVD.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE        ,
  WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
  DRVD.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
  DRVD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  DRVD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  DRVD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
  /*DRVD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY commented by sabanil as a part of RTEQ1FY15*/
  DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,/*RTEQ1FY15*/
  DRVD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
  DRVD.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
  DRVD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  ,
  DRVD.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
  DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
  DRVD.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD            ,
  DRVD.DV_CHARGES_FLG                ,
  DRVD.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG           ,
  DRVD.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     ,
  DRVD.DV_MISC_FLG                   ,
  DRVD.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       ,
  DRVD.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             ,
  DRVD.DV_SERVICE_FLG                ,
  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT *-1,
  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT *-1 ,
  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT  *-1 ,
  DRVD.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  *-1,
  DRVD.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
  DRVD.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG          ,
  DRVD.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM          ,
  DRVD.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
  DRVD.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   ,
  DRVD.SHIPPED_DT                    ,
  DRVD.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           ,
  DRVD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
  DRVD.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME         ,
  DRVD.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
  DRVD.MAJOR_LINE_FLG                ,
  DRVD.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
  DRVD.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
  DRVD.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               ,
  DRVD.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        ,
  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT  *-1,
  DRVD.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT  ,   
  DRVD.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD     ,  
  DRVD.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  , 
  DRVD.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          ,
  DRVD.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           ,
  DRVD.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         ,
  DRVD.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
  DRVD.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
  USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
  USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
  DRVD.SALES_REP_NUM                 ,
  WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DV_FISCAL_DT , 
  'I' AS NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
  DRVD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
  DRVD.DEFAULT_SC_FLG                ,
  DRVD.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            ,
  DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            ,
  DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
  DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
  /*DRVD.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,*/
  DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT AS OLD_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
  'INSERT' AS EVENT_TYPE    ,
  DRVD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY  , 
  DRVD.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  , 
  DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * 100.0000000/COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) AS DV_TRX_AMT, 
  DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * 100.0000000/COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) AS DV_FUNC_AMT
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_TX_SQ_ID_RTE WI
   ON  DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
   AND DRVD.BK_SS_CD = WI.BK_SS_CD 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRA
  ON(NRA.REVeNUE_TRANSFER_KEY=DRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX  NRSCA
    ON  NRSCA.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NRA.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT   
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX SRSCA
  ON (SRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY=NRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY )
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER ( PARTITION BY DRVD.BK_SS_CD , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,   NRSCA.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT , DRVD.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT
  ORDER BY WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT DESC)=1

SELECT
  DRVD.DV_REVENUE_FLG   ,             
  ROW_NUMBER()  OVER( ORDER BY WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ) AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , /*Actual transaction_seq_id will be calculated while populating to DRVD table */
  DRVD.BK_SS_CD       ,               
  case when coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 then  DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
    else DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100)) 
  end AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
  case when coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 then  DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
    else DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100)) 
  end AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
  DRVD.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT      ,
  DRVD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD      ,        
  DRVD.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD     ,       
  DRVD.LINE_TYPE_CD           ,       
  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS SPLIT_PCT,
  DRVD.GL_DTM                        ,
  DRVD.GL_POSTED_DTM                 ,
  DRVD.RULE_START_DTM                ,
  'FORWARD' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CD  ,
  'Y' AS LAST_RECORD_FLG ,
  DRVD.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD        ,
  DRVD.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
  WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,
  WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT  AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
  DRVD.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE        ,
  WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
  DRVD.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
  DRVD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  DRVD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,
  /*DRVD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY commented by sabanil as a part of RTEQ1FY15*/
  DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,/*RTEQ1FY15*/
  DRVD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
  DRVD.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
  DRVD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  ,
  DRVD.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
  DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
  WI.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE  ,
  DRVD.DV_CHARGES_FLG                ,
  DRVD.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG           ,
  DRVD.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     ,
  DRVD.DV_MISC_FLG                   ,
  DRVD.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       ,
  DRVD.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             ,
  DRVD.DV_SERVICE_FLG                ,
  case when coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 then  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
    else DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100))    
  end AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
  case when coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 then  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT 
    else DRVD.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100)) 
  end AS DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
  case when coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 then  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT
    else DRVD.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT   * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100))   
  end AS DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT ,
  case when coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 then  DRVD.DV_EXTENDED_QTY
    else DRVD.DV_EXTENDED_QTY   * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100)) 
  end AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,
  DRVD.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
  DRVD.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG          ,
  DRVD.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM          ,
  DRVD.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
  DRVD.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   ,
  DRVD.SHIPPED_DT                    ,
  DRVD.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           ,
  DRVD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
  DRVD.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME         ,
  DRVD.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
  DRVD.MAJOR_LINE_FLG                ,
  DRVD.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
  DRVD.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
  DRVD.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               ,
  DRVD.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        ,
  case when coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 then  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT 
    else DRVD.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT  * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ coalesce(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100))  
  end AS DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT ,
  DRVD.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT     ,
  DRVD.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD       ,
  DRVD.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   ,
  DRVD.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          ,
  DRVD.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           ,
  DRVD.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         ,
  DRVD.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
  DRVD.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
  USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
  USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
  WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER  AS SALES_REP_NUM,  
  WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM       AS DV_FISCAL_DT, 
  'I' AS NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
  DRVD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
  '=' AS DEFAULT_SC_FLG,
  WI.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
  WI.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD   ,
  DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
  DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
  DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT AS OLD_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
  'INSERT' AS EVENT_TYPE,
  DRVD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
  DRVD.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
  DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * 100.0000000/COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) AS DV_TRX_AMT, 
  DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * 100.0000000/COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) AS DV_FUNC_AMT
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (DRVD.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_TX_SQ_ID_FORWARD WI
   ON  DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT 
   AND DRVD.BK_SS_CD = WI.BK_SS_CD
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRA
  ON(NRA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=DRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX NRSCA
  ON  NRSCA.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT=WI.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT

SELECT 
  DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , 
  DRVD.BK_SS_CD , 
  DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , 
  DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
NULL OLD_DEFAULT_SC_FLG,       
  NRSCA.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,  
  NRSCA.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD, 
  NSCTT.QUOTA_FLAG,    
  NRSCA.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ,
  CASE  WHEN ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  ) < (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100) 
   THEN NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
   ELSE   NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
  END AS BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT , 
  CASE  WHEN ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  ) < (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
   THEN NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
   ELSE   NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
  END AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
  CASE  WHEN ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  ) < (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
   THEN (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
   ELSE   ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  )
  END AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT, 
-999 AS EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT,         
-999 AS EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT,
-999 AS  EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
  NRSCA.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT, 
  NRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
NULL AS EVENT_TYPE,
  NRSCA.SALES_REP_NUM  ,
  NRSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
 FROM 
  ( SELECT BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
   FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH 
   WHERE CURRENT_DATE-1 BETWEEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
  ) NFISMN_SYS ,
  
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV  DRVD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON DRVD.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRA
ON(NRA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=DRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX   NRSCA
   ON NRSCA.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NRA.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT   
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX SRSCA
ON (SRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY=NRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY )
INNER JOIN 
 ( SELECT BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE, SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG   QUOTA_FLAG
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV  
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE   ORDER BY END_TV_DATE DESC)=1
) NSCTT
  ON NRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD = NSCTT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN  
  ON  NRSCA.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM BETWEEN NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
 WHERE
  DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD IN ('X','R')
  AND DRVD.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD = 'FORWARD' 
  AND DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLG = 'Y' 
   /* TO PULL INCREMENTALLY */
/* AND NRA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'ERP' :Q1FY17   Commented as part of Q1FY18 XAAS SC*/  
AND NRSCA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM   > '$$LastExtractDate'
 QUALIFY RANK () OVER ( PARTITION BY BK_SS_CD , DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD  , DV_TRANSACTION_KEY, NRSCA.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ORDER BY BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT DESC)=1
